incoming.name: Henry Zimmerman
incoming.bio: Henry founded AES's first Fed Challenge team, which competed in the Federal Reserve Bank of New York's national research competition on this year's theme: the economics of music. He also helped launch the research colloquium, which puts students in front of Boston policymakers to defend their policy briefs. Outside AES, he does astrophysics research, captains the cross country team, and tutors at the Writing Center.
